hero_subtitle: SFTY Business helps compliance operations turn wallet risk events into structured cases with audit-ready evidence, review routing, and integrated provider orchestration across KYC and KYT workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Case creation depends on manual review
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and inefficiencies when wallet risk alerts generate fragmented, manual workflows. This slows case initiation and obscures clear linkage between wallet risk events and evidence needed for audit readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects wallet risk alerts, provider outputs and review actions into automated case workflows enabling compliance teams to rapidly create, manage and audit wallet risk investigations in one system.
workflow_title: From wallet risk alerts to cases
workflow_description: SFTY captures wallet risk signals, routes alerts through defined review steps, opens structured cases, preserves evidence and tracks decisions for compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One case layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects wallet risk signals into structured cases, decisions and evidence so compliance teams can manage wallet risk with clear workflows and audit-ready control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY equips VASP operations with governed wallet case creation, preserved audit evidence and controlled deployment for consistent review and bank due diligence support.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support wallet risk case creation workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how wallet risk alerts trigger case creation
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence is preserved in wallet cases
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe provider orchestration for wallet compliance workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for wallet case workflows?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures wallet risk alerts into compliance workflows, connecting provider outputs into cases, decisions, evidence and reports for regulated digital asset businesses like VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY create cases from wallet risks?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal rules and risk thresholds to wallet risk signals, automatically routing and creating cases for review and escalation within defined workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and related evidence to support audit readiness and facilitate transparent compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools, connecting their outputs into one controlled compliance operating layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace wallet risk providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above wallet risk providers, connecting and structuring their outputs without replacing the underlying analytics or screening systems.
final_title: Structure wallet risk cases into compliant workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects wallet risk alerts to case creation, evidence preservation and compliance workflow automation for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
